query:
SELECT 'fichas_custo' as tabela, tenant_id, COUNT(*) as total FROM fichas_custo GROUP BY tenant_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'orcamentos', tenant_id, COUNT(*) FROM orcamentos GROUP BY tenant_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'itens_orcamento', tenant_id, COUNT(*) FROM itens_orcamento GROUP BY tenant_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'users', tenant_id, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY tenant_id;
